examples: The house had many drawbacks, most notably its price.
The divorce would be granted when more important problems, notably the fate of the children, had been decided.
Growth which rarely continues beyond the age of 20, demands calories and nutrients—notably, protein—to feed expanding tissues.
For Black Americans, the primary figures have generally been preachers, notably Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
Sausmarez Manor is thought to be full of ghosts, notably the Nanny of the 28 Children.
